Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Calder Marten]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — Calder is the son of Rojric.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder Marten is the Captain of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Calder Marten can invest wood into his ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Calder Marten is the thirteen-year-old pupil of Artur Belfry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten is the son of Alsa Grayweather.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Calder is a Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Calder uses an unloaded musket as a crutch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Calder Marten is the pupil of Artur Belfry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Calder Marten is a character in the story.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is a Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten's wife has been kidnapped or possibly killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is one of Cheska's Navigators and was formerly of the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The character's full name is Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder Marten is a Captain whose ship was attacked in Candle Bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder Marten and his crew are responsible for Naberius's captivity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder Marten is a character who realizes he needs to leave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten is a Reader who uses Intent to summon Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten is the person Kelarac is addressing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder Marten is a Reader of Memory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Calder Marten is accused of destroying an Imperial prison, conspiring to set free a prisoner, and stealing a ship belonging to the Blackwatch Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Calder Marten was exiled to the Aion under the supervision of the Navigators.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Calder Marten is twenty-six years old and a former Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera has a file on Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Calder Marten is a character who has been selling Stormwing ichor to alchemists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten is married to Jyrine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten is awake and can control the ship as part of his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Calder Marten has red hair and wears a blue jacket.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Calder Marten drew a gun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Calder Marten was moving away from the fight with his mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Calder Marten lifted the Heart of Nakothi from Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten entered the hall flanked by Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Calder Marten abused the power of the Emperor’s crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Calder Marten has an Elderspawn pet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Calder Marten wields an orange-stained cutlass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Calder Marten possesses an orange-and-black sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Calder Marten is a Navigator who brought the Heart to its current location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Calder Marten's wife is a member of the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Calder Marten was Reading to glimpse his wife.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Calder Marten is the name of the character referred to as Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Calder Marten is a character who can move his ship through consciousness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Calder Marten was dragged out of the Emperor's palace by two Imperial Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten is the Imperial Steward of the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Calder Marten uses an orange-spotted blade given to him by Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Calder Marten possesses Kelarac's mark on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Calder Marten claims to be the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Calder's full name is Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Calder Marten is a Watchman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder Marten was meant to rule as King of this world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Calder Marten was trained by his mother to be a duelist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder Marten is twenty-six years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder Marten was sentenced to forced labor in the service of the Navigator’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten is wearing a three-cornered hat and a dark blue coat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten's coat buttons feature the Navigator crest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten has spent five years in a Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten received basic sword training from his father and advanced instruction from his mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten has a ship named The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten has a debt to the throne caused by a daring rescue plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Calder Marten has fought Elderspawn, cultists, rebels, Consultant assassins, Imperial Guards, and Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Calder Marten is part of a crew planning to detonate charges in an arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Calder is a Navigator aboard his ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Calder Marten is part of a crew headed into lethal danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Calder Marten is a person who has been trying to stretch time as much as possible.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Calder Marten's intent is described as passion, ambition, satisfaction, and the itch of still-healing wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Calder Marten is a Consultant saboteur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Lucan elected to meet with Calder Marten alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Calder Marten is leading the Navigator's Guild attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Calder Marten is a person who once tore through with the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Calder Marten is referred to as a novice Emperor who has 'found himself a real sword'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Calder Marten is a character who has been with Shera.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Calder Marten wore a suit of pure white armor that covered him from head to toe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Calder Marten's helmet visor was covered by what looked like darkened glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Calder Marten is a spawn of Urg'naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Calder Marten has a young face and a short, red beard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Calder Marten wears the Emperor's white armor from the neck down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Captain Calder lent Petal a tiny spyglass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Calder Marten uses the Emperor's Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder Marten's consciousness was projected through the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is a crew member of The Reliable.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Calder Marten is a leader who will insist on being at the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Calder Marten is a participant in the debate and may be endorsed as Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten is a character mentioned by Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Calder Marten has been accused of consorting with Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Calder Marten was almost burned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is a pawn of Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten released a statement saying he would address the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten uses a body double to address the public.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The body double wears the Emperor’s clothes but not Calder's white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Calder Marten is a Navigator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Calder Marten was seen sitting and chatting with Imperial Guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten is the pretender to the throne and wears the Emperor’s armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten was thought to be dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Calder Marten claims to have spoken to the man in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Estyr mentioned she would kill Calder Marten if he got out of line.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Calder Marten has a ship with a humanoid fish-creature bound to it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Calder Marten held an orange Awakened blade.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
